global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear focus on a flash sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with bestsellers at a discounted price.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Two stylized product images with reflective surfaces, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Shop bestsellers now'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A prominent price tag in white text showing '€29.99' at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with white text saying 'Get offer' located at the bottom center.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' displayed at the top left in bold white text.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text at the top right.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, product images are in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
